Clear description of the task to be completed.

Implementation details, files to modify, dependencies.

- [ ] Code implemented
- [ ] Unit tests written
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Code reviewed
- [ ] Tested manually

[e.g., 2 hours, 1 day]
